zh.lifeSummary: 當Gillespic Campbell於1266年出生時，他的父親Cailean or Colin Mor Campbell36歲，母親Janet Isabel Sinclair34歲。他於1290年之前與Elizabeth Stewart在蘇格蘭阿吉爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1313年9月9日在英國諾圖波藍德布藍斯頓享年47歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gillespic Campbell于1266年出生时，他的父亲Cailean or Colin Mor Campbell36岁，母亲Janet Isabel Sinclair34岁。他于1290年之前与Elizabeth Stewart在苏格兰阿吉爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1313年9月9日在英国諾圖波藍德布藍斯頓享年47岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Campbell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: nickname from Gaelic cam ‘crooked, bent’ + beul ‘mouth’. As a result of folk etymology, the surname was often represented in Latin documents as de bello campo ‘of the fair field’, which led to the name sometimes being ‘translated’ into Anglo-Norman French as Beauchamp .
Irish (North Armagh): adopted for Gaelic Mac Cathmhaoil ‘son of Cathmhaol’ (literally ‘battle chief’): see Caulfield and Cowell .
English: variant of   Camel  , under the influence of the Scottish name (see 1 above).

variants.name: Campell
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: variant of   Campbell   (see also   Camel  ).

variants.name: Beauchamp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Antoine, Jacques, Yves, Andre, Armand, Emile, Fernand, Marcel, Marthe, Remi, Alcide, Camille.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of several places in France, for example in Manche and Somme, that are named with Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + champ(s) ‘field, plain’ (from Latin bello campo ‘beautiful field’). In English the surname is generally pronounced Beecham . Compare Bushaw .
English: in some cases, an Anglo-Norman French adaptation of Scottish Campbell , by translation into French of the folk etymology de campo bello ‘from the fair field’.

variants.name: Camel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Napoleon, Patrice.

English (of Norman origin) and French: nickname from Norman French came(i)l ‘camel’ (from Latin camelus, classical Greek kamēlos), possibly denoting a clumsy person or someone with long legs. It may also be a topographic or habitational name referring to a house with a sign depicting a camel (although surnames derived from house and inn signs are rare in English); compare 5 below.
English: possibly a habitational name from Queen Camel and West Camel in Somerset, early recorded as Camel(le), possibly a Celtic name from canto- ‘border, district’ and mēl ‘bare hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Gillespic
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of Gaelic Gille Easbaig ‘bishop's servant’. Gille Easbaig Cambeul was the founder of Clan Campbell.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Gillespic Campbell was born in 1266, his father, Cailean or Colin Mor Campbell, was 36 and his mother, Janet Isabel Sinclair, was 34. He married Elizabeth Stewart before 1290, in Argyll, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 9 September 1313, in Branxton, Northumberland, England, at the age of 47, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gillespic Campbell est né en 1266, son père, Cailean or Colin Mor Campbell, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Janet Isabel Sinclair, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Stewart avant 1290, à Argyll, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 9 septembre 1313, à Branxton, Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gillespic Campbell 1266 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Cailean or Colin Mor Campbell 36 und seine Mutter Janet Isabel Sinclair 34. Er hat vor 1290 in Argyll, Scotland Elizabeth Stewart geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 9. September 1313 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Branxton, Northumberland, England und wurde in Scotland begraben.

Lui sposato Elizabeth Stewart prima del 1290, nel Argyll, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 9 settembre 1313, nel Branxton, Northumberland, England, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolto a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Gillespic Campbellが1266年に生まれた時，父Cailean or Colin Mor Campbellは36歳，母Janet Isabel Sinclairは34歳であった。1290年以前にスコットランドアルグイルでElizabeth Stewartと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1313年9月9日にイギリスノースウンバーランドブランクストンで47歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gillespic Campbell(이)가 1266년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Cailean or Colin Mor Campbell(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Janet Isabel Sinclair(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1290년 이전 스컷랜드 아그이에서 Elizabeth Stewart(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1313년 9월 9일 영국 노르스벌랜드 브랜스턴에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gillespic Campbell nasceu em 1266, seu pai, Cailean or Colin Mor Campbell, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Janet Isabel Sinclair, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Stewart antes 1290, em Argyll, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 9 de setembro de 1313, em Branxton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, com 47 anos, e foi sepultado em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gillespic Campbell родился в 1266 г., его отцу по имени Cailean or Colin Mor Campbell было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Janet Isabel Sinclair, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Stewart перед 1290 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 9 сентября 1313 г. в местности бранкстон, нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 47 лет и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.
